# GitHub Copilot Instructions

This repository is a research and data workspace for AI Conversion Atlas.

Follow `docs/AGENT_BRIEF.md` and `AGENTS.md`.

Do not invent sources, citations, scores, or indicator values. Keep claims separated by evidence type. Preserve missingness and uncertainty. Update `docs/DECISIONS.md` for methodology or architecture choices and `docs/TASKS.md` for task progress.
